reason: Cross-child + Sentry-hardening red-lines to verify: no content in any event/breadcrumb/tag/context, single toggle gates both tools, anonymous only, dependency budget.
This task's own acceptance criteria — crash + captured error appear, toggle-off = no Sentry init/network, one import site, Debug not in production env, one new SPM dep.
Verify conventions: Makefile test-<name> in test-all, Info.plist plutil -lint clean, single import-boundary mirrors the Telemetry section's pattern.
